title: Cloud Mountain mines
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Cloud Mountain mines''' were abandoned [[Mining/Legends|mines]] on [[Cloud Mountain]] used as a base of operations by the [[Cularin resistance]]. They were dug by [[Sunburst Mining]], but proved unproductive and were therefore abandoned. Sunburst left some [[Security droid/Legends|security droids]] to maintain their legal claim, however.<ref name="TRW">{{LivingForce|Eye of the Sun: The Resistance Within}}</ref>

The entrance to the mines were three-quarters of the way up on Cloud Mountain's northern face, which had been clear-cut by Sunburst. The mine's opening was about three [[Meter/Legends|meters]] tall and six meters wide, and the [[Blast door/Legends|blast doors]] which were once there had been removed. The mines went at least four [[Kilometer/Legends|kilometers]] deep, and had [[turbocart]]s to rapidly propel personnel or material from one end to the other. One area of the tunnel had collapsed beneath the turbocarts' magnetic rails, leaving the rails suspended over a 70-meter-deep pit for over a 100 meters of length.<ref name="TRW" />

Towards the end of Sunburst's mining, they tried drilling small holes randomly into the walls. They covered these up with meter-square plaques featuring the company's logo.<ref name="TRW" />

==History==
When the Cularin resistance moved in, they added a few security measures, including a blast door at the bottom of the turbocart tracks, a room with walls which compacted together, and a room of extreme heat.<ref name="TRW" /> The mines connected to a series of natural looking tunnels, perhaps dug by [[dua-wurm]]s,<ref name="ARv">{{LivingForce|Eye of the Sun: Revelation and Refutation}}</ref> which led to a large natural cavern.<ref name="TRW" /> The resistance set up their base in this cavern with an enormous multicolored command center tent over fifty meters across sitting in the middle of a tent city lit by lights set upon poles. They considered it a temporary base of operations, and were able to move their equipment out within a day.<ref name="TRW" />

The base was eventually discovered by the [[Metatheran Cartel]] when a [[Datapad/Legends|datapad]] stolen from the Cartel's offices in [[Gadrin]] was brought into the mines. The Cartel's soldiers attacked and killed or injured many resistance members, but were eventually rebuffed. Soon afterward, the resistance raided the Cartel's [[Metatheran Cartel jungle base|jungle base]] and gained evidence of [[Velin Wir]]'s crimes, ending the resistance's need for the base.<ref name="ARv" />

==Appearances==
*{{LivingForce|Eye of the Sun: The Resistance Within}}
*{{LivingForce|Eye of the Sun: Revelation and Refutation}}
